mapper.select: SELECT knowledge_document_id, enhancer_cache_key, keywords::text AS keywords, questions::text AS questions, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM knowledge_document_enhancement WHERE knowledge_document_id = CAST(#{knowledgeDocumentId} AS uuid)

SELECT knowledge_document_id, enhancer_cache_key, keywords::text AS keywords, questions::text AS questions, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM knowledge_document_enhancement WHERE knowledge_document_id IN
CAST(#{knowledgeDocumentId} AS uuid)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_document_enhancement (knowledge_document_id, enhancer_cache_key, keywords, questions, metadata, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (CAST(#{knowledgeDocumentId} AS uuid), #{enhancerCacheKey}, CAST(#{keywords} AS jsonb), CAST(#{questions} AS jsonb), CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON CONFLICT (knowledge_document_id) DO UPDATE SET enhancer_cache_key = EXCLUDED.enhancer_cache_key, keywords = EXCLUDED.keywords, questions = EXCLUDED.questions, metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM knowledge_document_enhancement WHERE knowledge_document_id = CAST(#{knowledgeDocumentId} AS uuid)
